/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X: DEFENSEORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE ON HOME DETENTION IS GRANTED,/STWPX/OR/CTORD:  DEFENDANT SHALL LEAVE THEIR RESIDENCE, SHALL NOT DRIVE, SHALL NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA, SHALL NOT POSSESS ANY DRUGS WITHOUT VALID PRESCRIPTION,AND SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTING WHEN DIRECTED/WS/X: AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING (HOME DETNTION) BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF: SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: TBH DEPT 12 TO JOIN 21000083/
